have h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₃ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1 ≥ 0 := by
      have h₄ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
      have h₅ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1
      have h₆ : z ≠ 1 := h₀.2.2
      have h₇ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₄; linarith
      have h₈ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₅; linarith
      have h₉ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₆; linarith
      have h₁₀ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₇
      have h₁₁ : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₈
      have h₁₂ : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₉
      have h₁₃ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by positivity
      field_simp [h₇, h₈, h₉]
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
        sq_nonneg (x * y + y * z + z * x - 3), sq_nonneg (x * y - y * z), sq_nonneg (y * z - z * x),
        sq_nonneg (z * x - x * y), mul_self_nonneg (x * y * z - 1)]
    linarith
  exact h₂

have h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₃ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      apply h₀.1
      linarith
    have h₄ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      apply h₀.2.1
      linarith
    have h₅ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      apply h₀.2.2
      linarith
    have h₆ : (x - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      exact h₃
    have h₇ : (y - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      exact h₄
    have h₈ : (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      exact h₅
    have h₉ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by positivity
    field_simp [h₃, h₄, h₅]
    rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x - y) * (x - 1) * (y - 1)), sq_nonneg ((y - z) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)),
      sq_nonneg ((z - x) * (z - 1) * (x - 1)), sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (z - 1) * (x - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) - y * (z - 1) * (x - 1)), sq_nonneg (y * (z - 1) * (x - 1) - z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - x * (y - 1) * (z - 1))]
  exact h₂

have h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₃ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + 1 ≥ 2 * x / (x - 1) := by
      have h₃₁ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₀.1
        linarith
      have h₃₂ : (x - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₃₁
      field_simp [h₃₁]
      rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - (x - 1))]
    have h₄ : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + 1 ≥ 2 * y / (y - 1) := by
      have h₄₁ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₀.2.1
        linarith
      have h₄₂ : (y - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₄₁
      field_simp [h₄₁]
      rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - (y - 1))]
    have h₅ : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 + 1 ≥ 2 * z / (z - 1) := by
      have h₅₁ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₀.2.2
        linarith
      have h₅₂ : (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
        exact h₅₁
      field_simp [h₅₁]
      rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (z - (z - 1))]
    have h₆ : 2 * x / (x - 1) + 2 * y / (y - 1) + 2 * z / (z - 1) ≥ 4 := by
      have h₆₁ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
      have h₆₂ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1
      have h₆₃ : z ≠ 1 := h₀.2.2
      have h₆₄ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₆₁
        linarith
      have h₆₅ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₆₂
        linarith
      have h₆₆ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply h₆₃
        linarith
      have h₆₇ : 2 * x / (x - 1) + 2 * y / (y - 1) + 2 * z / (z - 1) = 2 * x / (x - 1) + 2 * y / (y - 1) + 2 * z / (z - 1) := by rfl
      have h₆₈ : 2 * x / (x - 1) + 2 * y / (y - 1) + 2 * z / (z - 1) ≥ 4 := by
        have h₆₉ : 2 * x / (x - 1) + 2 * y / (y - 1) + 2 * z / (z - 1) = (2 * x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) := by
          field_simp [h₆₄, h₆₅, h₆₆]
          <;> ring
          <;> field_simp [h₆₄, h₆₅, h₆₆]
          <;> ring
        rw [h₆₉]
        have h₆₁₀ : (2 * x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ≥ 4 := by
          have h₆₁₁ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
            apply mul_ne_zero
            · apply mul_ne_zero <;>
              (try simp_all) <;>
              (try intro h; apply h₀.1 <;> linarith) <;>
              (try intro h; apply h₀.2.1 <;> linarith)
            · simp_all
              <;>
              (try intro h; apply h₀.2.2 <;> linarith)
          have h₆₁₂ : (2 * x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) ≥ 4 * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) := by
            nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
              mul_self_nonneg (x + y + z), mul_self_nonneg (x - y + z), mul_self_nonneg (x + y - z),
              mul_self_nonneg (x - y - z)]
          have h₆₁₃ : 0 < ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by
            apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
            exact h₆₁₁
          by_cases h₆₁₄ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) > 0
          · -- Case: (x - 1)(y - 1)(z - 1) > 0
            have h₆₁₅ : 0 < (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) := by linarith
            have h₆₁₆ : (2 * x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ≥ 4 := by
              rw [ge_iff_le]
              rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
              nlinarith
            linarith
          · -- Case: (x - 1)(y - 1)(z - 1) < 0
            have h₆₁₅ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) < 0 := by
              by_contra h
              have h₆₁₆ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h₆₁₇ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) > 0 := by
                by_contra h'
                have h₆₁₈ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) = 0 := by
                  linarith
                contradiction
              linarith
            have h₆₁₆ : (2 * x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + 2 * z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) / ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ≥ 4 := by
              rw [ge_iff_le]
              rw [le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)]
              nlinarith
            linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    have h₇ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
      linarith [h₃, h₄, h₅, h₆]
    exact h₇
  exact h₂

have h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₃ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1 ≥ 0 := by
      have h₄ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
      have h₅ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1
      have h₆ : z ≠ 1 := h₀.2.2
      have h₇ : x * y * z = 1 := h₁
      have h₈ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₄; linarith
      have h₉ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₅; linarith
      have h₁₀ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₆; linarith
      -- Clear denominators by multiplying through by (x-1)^2 (y-1)^2 (z-1)^2
      have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₁₂ : 0 ≤ (x - y) ^ 2 + (y - z) ^ 2 + (z - x) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₁₃ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄)
      have h₁₄ : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅)
      have h₁₅ : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := by
        exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₆)
      have h₁₆ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by positivity
      field_simp [h₈, h₉, h₁₀]
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
      -- Expand and simplify the expression to show that it is non-negative
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
        sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
        mul_nonneg h₁₃.le h₁₄.le, mul_nonneg h₁₄.le h₁₅.le, mul_nonneg h₁₅.le h₁₃.le,
        sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3)]
    linarith
  exact h₂

have h₂ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
  have h₃ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1
  have h₄ : z ≠ 1 := h₀.2.2
  have h₅ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₅
    apply h₂
    linarith
  have h₆ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₆
    apply h₃
    linarith
  have h₇ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₇
    apply h₄
    linarith
  have h₈ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₉ : (x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by
      have h₁₀ : (x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 = (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [h₅, h₆, h₇]
        ring_nf
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try
          {
            rw [← sub_eq_zero]
            ring_nf at h₁ ⊢
            nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄)]
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            field_simp [h₅, h₆, h₇] at h₁ ⊢ <;>
            ring_nf at h₁ ⊢ <;>
            nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄)]
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            field_simp [h₅, h₆, h₇] at h₁ ⊢ <;>
            ring_nf at h₁ ⊢ <;>
            nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄)]
          })
      rw [h₁₀]
      have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by
        have h₁₂ : 0 ≤ (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by positivity
        have h₁₃ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by positivity
        have h₁₄ : 0 ≤ ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by positivity
        have h₁₅ : 0 ≤ (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) := by positivity
        have h₁₆ : 0 ≤ (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 / ((x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by positivity
        linarith
      linarith
    have h₁₇ : ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have h₁₈ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₂; linarith
      have h₁₉ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₃; linarith
      have h₂₀ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₄; linarith
      have h₂₁ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have h₂₂ : (x - 1) = 0 ∨ (y - 1) = 0 ∨ (z - 1) = 0 := by
          have h₂₃ : (x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1) = 0 := by linarith
          simp [sub_eq_zero] at h₂₃ ⊢
          tauto
        cases h₂₂ with
        | inl h₂₂ =>
          apply h₁₈
          linarith
        | inr h₂₂ =>
          cases h₂₂ with
          | inl h₂₂ =>
            apply h₁₉
            linarith
          | inr h₂₂ =>
            apply h₂₀
            linarith
      exact by positivity
    have h₂₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1 ≥ 0 := by
      by_contra h₂₃
      have h₂₄ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1 < 0 := by linarith
      have h₂₅ : (x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 - 1) * ((x - 1) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)) ^ 2 < 0 := by
        nlinarith [h₁₇]
      linarith
    linarith
  exact h₈

    have h₄ : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := by

    have h₅ : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := by

      sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) - y * (x - 1) * (z - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) - z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) - z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z - 3)]
  exact h₂

so the sum is 3 + (1/(x - 1) + ...).
```

We previously had an expression for `1/(x - 1) + ...`, which involved `q - 2p + 3` over `p - q`. 

But perhaps this is not the best approach yet.

**A Better Approach Found Elsewhere:**
Actually, I recall that in some similar problems, substituting `a = 1/(x - 1)` etc. helps. 

Let me try:
Let `a = 1/(x - 1)`, `b = 1/(y - 1)`, `c = 1/(z - 1)`. Then `x = 1 + 1/a`, etc. 
The constraint `xyz = 1` becomes:
`(1 + 1/a)(1 + 1/b)(1 + 1/c) = 1`.

Expanding the LHS:
`(1 + 1/a)(1 + 1/b)(1 + 1/c) = 1 + 1/a + 1/b + 1/c + 1/(ab) + 1/(ac) + 1/(bc) + 1/(abc) = 1`.

Thus:
`1/a + 1/b + 1/c + 1/(ab) + 1/(ac) + 1/(bc) + 1/(abc) = 0`.

But `x² / (x - 1)² = (1 + 1/a)²

have h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    have h₃ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      intro h₃
      apply h₀.1
      linarith
    have h₄ : 0 < (y - 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      intro h₄
      apply h₀.2.1
      linarith
    have h₅ : 0 < (z - 1) ^ 2 := by
      apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
      intro h₅
      apply h₀.2.2
      linarith
    have h₆ : 0 < (x - 1) ^ 2 * (y - 1) ^ 2 * (z - 1) ^ 2 := by positivity
    field_simp [h₃.ne', h₄.ne', h₅.ne']
    rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
    -- Now we need to prove that the numerator is ≥ the denominator.
    -- Use nlinarith with the appropriate identities and inequalities.
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg ((x - y) * (x - 1) * (y - 1)), sq_nonneg ((y - z) * (y - 1) * (z - 1)),
      sq_nonneg ((z - x) * (z - 1) * (x - 1)), sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) + y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) + z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (x * (y - 1) * (z - 1) - y * (x - 1) * (z - 1)), sq_nonneg (y * (x - 1) * (z - 1) - z * (x - 1) * (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (z * (x - 1) * (y - 1) - x * (y - 1) * (z - 1))]
  exact h₂
